feature: Report Consolidation: Flujo de Caja with ComposedChart + Rentabilidad with 5 sub-tabs
summary: Complete testing of report consolidation changes. All 23 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed. Flujo de Caja tab shows ComposedChart with bars+line, agrupacion selector (Diario/Semanal/Mensual), and detail table. Rentabilidad tab shows 5 sub-tabs (Dinero, Ventas, Cobranza, Linea x Marca, Gastos). Sidebar cleaned with only 3 items under Reportes. Old routes render blank pages (routes removed from App.js).

Backend_flujo_caja_gerencial.details: Returns timeline array with periodo, ingresos, egresos, saldo_acumulado. Supports agrupacion: diario/semanal/mensual. Totales include ingresos, egresos, flujo_neto.

Backend_dinero_por_linea.details: Returns data array with linea, ventas, cobranzas, cxc_pendiente, gastos, saldo_neto. Totales match sum of data.

Backend_ventas_por_linea.details: Returns data array with linea, ventas, tickets, ticket_promedio. Totales include ventas, tickets, ticket_promedio.

Backend_cobranza_por_linea.details: Returns data array with linea, vendido, cobrado, pendiente, pct_cobrado. Totales include all fields.

Backend_cruce_linea_marca.details: Returns array of lineas, each with marcas array containing marca, ventas, tickets, pct.

Backend_gastos_directos_por_linea.details: Returns data array with linea, total_gastos, total_facturas, total_egresos. Totales match sum.

Frontend_7_tabs_visible.details: All 7 tabs visible: Balance General, Estado de Resultados, Flujo de Caja, Inventario Valorizado, Rentabilidad x Linea, CxP Aging, CxC Aging.

Frontend_flujo_caja_tab.details: Shows 3 KPIs (Total Ingresos, Total Egresos, Flujo Neto), ComposedChart with bars (Ingresos/Egresos) + line (Saldo Acum.), detail table with all periods.

Frontend_agrupacion_selector.details: Agrupacion selector (Diario/Semanal/Mensual) appears ONLY on Flujo tab. Hidden on other tabs.

Frontend_rentabilidad_5_subtabs.details: 5 sub-tabs visible: Dinero por Linea, Ventas por Linea, Cobranza por Linea, Linea x Marca, Gastos por Linea. Each shows appropriate KPIs and table.

Frontend_excel_export.details: Excel export button visible on Flujo and Rentabilidad tabs.

Frontend_sidebar_cleaned.details: Sidebar Reportes section has only 3 items: Reportes Financieros, Libro Analitico, Valorización Inventario. No duplicates.

Frontend_old_routes_removed.details: Old routes /flujo-caja, /reportes-simplificados, /rentabilidad-linea render blank pages (routes removed from App.js).

Frontend_cxp_cxc_aging_tabs.details: CxP Aging and CxC Aging tabs still work correctly after changes.

tests_executed.name: Frontend: Agrupacion selector on Flujo only

seed_data_creation: Using existing data from previous iterations.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Report consolidation complete. Flujo de Caja tab uses Recharts ComposedChart with bars (Ingresos/Egresos) + line (Saldo Acumulado). Agrupacion selector (diario/semanal/mensual) only appears on Flujo tab. Rentabilidad tab has 5 sub-tabs with data-testid: rent-sub-dinero, rent-sub-ventas, rent-sub-cobranza, rent-sub-cruce, rent-sub-gastos. Sidebar cleaned - only 3 items under Reportes. Old standalone routes removed from App.js.
